keySetup.title: I-setup ti susi ti device mo
keySetup.description: Daytoy a device ket awan pay ti private key mo. Importa ti password-protected backup, wenno agbuat ka ti baro a keypair (mabalinmo a basaen dagiti baro a mensahe manipud ita).
keySetup.chooseFile: Pili ti file ken iserrek ti password.
keySetup.imported: Na-import ti private key ditoy a device. Mabalinmo a basaen dagiti daan a mensahe.
keySetup.enterPassword: Iserrek ti password ti account mo tapno ma-secure a ma-backup ti susi mo.

auth.headline: Secure a panagimessage para ken sianoman, sadino man
auth.description: End-to-end encryption, panagtranslate kadagiti 100+ a pagsasao, agpagarup a mensahe, ken voice/video calling.

feature.translation: Smart, built-in a panagtranslate ti mensahe
feature.privacy: Privacy-first. Ti data mo, ti control mo.
feature.translate: Smart, built-in a panagtranslate ti mensahe

hero.line1: Secure a panagimessage para ken sianoman, sadino man — agraman
hero.sub: Agsarungkar ka ti libre a secure a phone number tapno agtawag ken agtext ka worldwide babaen ti Wi-Fi wenno data. Enjoyem ti end-to-end encryption, agpagarup a mensahe, ken HD voice/video calling — agraman built-in a ramramad a tumulong nga agpaut ti panagkonektar across borders.
hero.freeNote: Ti basic a panagtawag ken panagtext ket libre. Ti advanced AI ken premium features ket kasapulan ti upgrade.

feat.translate: Lupaan ti panagsao a panagsao mo
feat.privacy: Privacy-first. Ti data mo, ti control mo.

auth.desktopTip: Ditoy desktop? I-scan babaen ti phone mo tapno alaen ti app.
auth.scanHelper: Ditoy desktop? I-scan babaen ti phone mo tapno alaen ti app.
auth.subhead: Private, encrypted, ken na-translate a panagimessage — dagus.
auth.tip: Tip: Gamit ti isu met a account idiay web ken mobile. Agsynchron ti mensahe mo.
auth.scanHint: I-scan tapno ma-download ti app wenno lukatan idiay browser mo.

registration.passwordDescription: Minimum 6 a karakter. Gamit ti napigsa ken natibker a password.
registration.smsConsent: Babaen ti panagbuat account, maawatam ti SMS notifications a maipangpangato ti Chatforia activity mo (kas ti mensahe manipud kadagiti dadduma nga users). Mabalin a maaplikar ti message & data rates. Mabalinmo a i-off anytime idiay Settings.

profile.mustLogin: Masapul nga ag-login ka tapno makitam ti settings.
profile.showOriginalWithTranslation: Ipakita ti original ken na-translate a mensahe
profile.showOriginalAndTranslation: Ipakita ti original ken ti translation a side-by-side
profile.saveError: Error: Saan a ma-save ti settings

profile.setBackupPassword: Iserrek ti password tapno ma-encrypt ti backup mo:

profile.importFailed: Nabawi ti panag-import ti susi (salladaw a password wenno corrupt a file).
profile.keysRotated: Na-generate ti baro a key pair ken na-upload ti public key.
profile.keyDisclaimer: Ti private key mo ket saan a rumuar manipud ditoy a device. Exporta ti password-protected a copy tapno ma-restore idiay sabali a device.
profile.themeFreeNotice: Free ka — gamit ti quick Sun/Moon options nga adda ngato. Upgrade tapno ma-unlock ti ad-adu a themes.
profile.backupDesc: I-backup ti encryption key mo tapno ma-restore a seguro ti mensahe mo idiay sabali a device.
profile.planLoadFailed: Nabawi ti panagload ti plan mo.
profile.freePlanCopy: Free ka. Upgrade tapno ma-unlock ti ad-adu a features kas ti backups, extra numbers, ken advanced privacy options.
profile.portalOpenFailed: Saan a mabalin a lukatan ti billing portal. Pangngaasi ta padasem manen.
profile.notifyOnCopy: Notifyak no ma-copy ti mensahe ko
profile.followHint: Ti stories da ket agparang idiay Following feed mo no agpost da agraman audience Followers (wenno Public).
profile.sectionCrashedBody: Adda nagkamali idiay daytoy a section.
profile.callTextForwardingDescription: I-forward ti incoming calls ken texts ken ti verified phone wenno email mo. Ti outgoing calls/texts mabalin a mangiparang ti Chatforia number mo.
profile.errSmsDest: Pili ti maysa a destination (phone wenno email).
profile.errQuietHours: Ti quiet hours ket masapul nga agsanglad 0 ken 23.
profile.ageBandHint: I-store mi laeng ti age range (saan ti exact a birth date). Daytoy ket mausar tapno ma-reasonable ti Random Chat pairings.
profile.wantsAgeFilter: Gamit ti age-based matching idiay Random Chat
profile.wantsAgeFilterDesc: No on, agpadas kami a pair kenka kadagiti tattao nga adda compatible a age range.
profile.partnerAgeBands: Siasino ti mabalin a ma-pair kenka?
profile.partnerAgeBandsDesc: Ti teens ket laeng ma-pair kadagiti dadduma a teens. Ti adults ket saan a mabalin a ma-pair kadagiti teens.
profile.teenMatchingNote: Para ti seguridad, ti accounts nga adda 13–17 age range ket laeng ma-pair kadagiti dadduma a 13–17 accounts idiay Random Chat.
profile.foriaRemember: Bay-an ni Ria a malagip dagiti bagay nga ibagak kenkuana
profile.foriaRememberDesc: No daytoy ket on, ni Foria mabalin a gamit ti daan a Random Chat conversations mo (laeng kenka) tapno agtuloy ti panagchat. Mabalinmo a i-off anytime.
profile.voicemailAutoDeletePlaceholder: Bay-am nga awan ti laman tapno agtalinaed nga agnanamnam
profile.voicemailForwardEmailPlaceholder: Email nga pag-send ti voicemail notifications
profile.voicemailGreetingTextDesc: Mausar no saan a ma-access ti audio greeting mo.
profile.voicemailGreetingUploaded: Na-upload a successful ti voicemail greeting
profile.voicemailGreetingUploadError: Nabawi ti panag-upload ti voicemail greeting
profile.voicemailNote: Dagiti voicemails manipud kadagiti Chatforia numbers mo ket ma-store idiay Voicemail inbox mo. Mabalinmo a enable ti transcription ken forwarding idiay supported plans.
profile.portHint: Kayatmo a malagip ti current number mo? Mabalinmo a i-port idiay Chatforia Wireless.

options.portNumber: I-port ti current number mo idiay Chatforia Wireless

port.heading: I-port ti existing number mo
port.subheading: Iyalis ti current phone number mo manipud ti existing carrier mo idiay Chatforia. Siguroem nga agtutop dagiti detalye ken ti carrier account mo tapno awan ti delay.
port.fullNameLabel: Full name nga adda idiay account
port.success: Na-submit ti port request! Agtuloykami a mang-update kenka.

status.subheading: Track ti status dagiti number port requests mo.
status.loadError: Nabawi ti panagload ti port requests.

wireless.exhausted: Naubos ti data mo. Gumatang ka ti baro a pack tapno agtuloy ti panaggamit ti mobile data.

error.load: Nabawi ti panagload ti family details.
error.invite: Saan a mabalin a ma-crear ti invite. Siguroem nga isu ti family owner ken padasem manen.
error.checkout: Saan a mabalin a mangrugi ti checkout para ken Family plan. Pangngaasi ta padasem manen.

billing.myPlanError: Saan a mabalin a ma-load ti plan mo.
billing.freePlanCopy: Free ka. Upgrade tapno ma-unlock ti ad-adu a features.
billing.portalError: Saan a mabalin a lukatan ti billing portal ita.
billing.cancelNowHelp: Mabalinmo a manage wenno cancel ti subscription mo idiay billing portal, wenno cancel dagus nga adda ngato.
billing.cancelNowConfirm: Sigurado ka nga kayatmo a cancel ti plan mo dagus? Daytoy ket saan a mabalin a i-undo.
billing.cancelNowError: Saan a mabalin a cancel ti plan mo ita. Pangngaasi ta padasem manen wenno gamit ti Manage billing.

none.title: Awan pay ti family a na-setup
none.body: Tapno ma-crear ti Chatforia Family ken shared data pool, rugian ti Family plan.

data.heading: Shared data pool
data.caption: Amin a members ket agshare daytoy a pool. Agpaalerta kami no agdulotka ti limit mo.

invite.title: Invite ti baro a member
invite.body: Send ti email wenno link tapno ma-invite ti maysa a tao idiay shared family data pool mo.
invite.expiryHint: Daytoy a link ket ag-expire aging dagiti dadduma nga aldaw. Mabalinmo a ma-crear manen anytime.

join.title: Ag-join ti family
join.body: Na-invite ka a ag-join ti Chatforia Family ken agshare ti data pool da.
join.success: Na-join ka daytoy a family. Agshareka tattan ti data pool da.
join.error: Saan a mabalin a ma-dugtar ka daytoy a family. Mabalin a invalid wenno expired ti invite.

premium.heading: Mapan Premium
premium.description: Unlock ti power features & i-remove ti ads.

upgrade.title: Upgrade
upgrade.h1Subtitle: Rugian ti libre, ad-supported a plan. Mapan ad-free babaen ti Plus, wenno unlock ti full power features babaen ti Premium.
upgrade.subtitle: Pili ti app plan, agdugtar data packs para ken bagam, wenno agshare data ken pamilya mo — amin a naipangpangato ditoy a lugar.
upgrade.subtitle.app: Rugian ti libre, ad-supported a plan. Mapan ad-free babaen ti Plus, wenno unlock ti full power features babaen ti Premium.
upgrade.subtitle.mobile: Agdugtar global eSIM data tapno agtuloy ti Chatforia uray no awayka manipud Wi-Fi.
upgrade.subtitle.family: Agbuat shared data pool para ken pamilya mo ken manage ti usage ti tunggal maysa.
upgrade.benefitsLine: Unlock ti power features & i-remove ti ads.

free.title: Libre
free.desc: Rugian ti panagimessage nga libre. Naimbag no agpadas laeng ka ken Chatforia.

features.chat: Real-time 1:1 ken group chat, ken voice ken video calls
features.media: Share photos, voice messages, ken short videos
features.ai: AI-powered smart replies ken instant translation (fair use)
features.disappearing: Agpagarup a mensahe ken basic privacy controls
features.ads: Libre nga agnanamnam agraman ads idiay app

plus.title: Plus
plus.desc: Amin ti essentials, awan ads. Naimbag para ti inaldaw a panagimessage ken panagtawag.

features.allFree: Amin ti adda idiay Free, awan ads
features.forwarding: I-forward ti calls ken texts ken ti real phone number mo
features.history: Atiddog a message history (aging 6 a bulan)
features.support: Napardas a support no adda problema

plus.ctaPublic: Alaen ti Plus – agtuloy ken login

premiumMonthly.title: Premium (Bulan-bulan)
premiumMonthly.desc: Ti full Chatforia experience: AI power tools, customization, ken priority support.

features.themes: Unlock amin a premium color themes ken app customizations
features.ai: Premium-laeng a AI power tools para rewrites, smart replies, ken summaries

premiumAnnual.title: Premium (Taunan)
premiumAnnual.desc: Ag-save ka pay no taunan ti bayad — agraman extra color themes, AI tools, ken priority support.

features.allPremium: Amin ti adda idiay Premium Monthly — agraman extra color themes
features.save25: Ag-save ka agsanglad 30% no agbayadka bulan-bulan
features.bestFor: Naimbag para ken power users, remote workers, ken heavy travelers

premiumAnnual.ctaPublic: Save 30% babaen ti annual – agtuloy ken login
premiumAnnual.disclaimer: Bayad dagus. Mabalin a cancel anytime. Awan hidden fees.

marketing.plusDesc: Ti kaarngi a naaffordable a ad-free experience.
marketing.premiumMonthlyDesc: Full features, ringtones, ken AI power tools.
marketing.premiumAnnualDesc: Ag-save ka pay no taunan ti bayad.
marketing.annualDisclaimer: Bayad dagus. Mabalin a cancel anytime. Awan hidden fees.

mobile.title: Chatforia Mobile (eSIM data packs)
mobile.subtitle: Agdugtar global data tapno agtuloy ti Chatforia uray no awayka manipud Wi-Fi. Ti presyo ket ag-adjust a auto babaen ti pagilian ken currency mo.
mobile.subtitle.detail: Pili ti maysa a one-time global data pack tapno agtuloy ti Chatforia no agtravelka wenno awayka manipud Wi-Fi.
mobile.note: Saanmi a ma-sell dagiti data packs nga adda babasit 3 GB.

features.heavyUse: Napardas a data para ken heavy use
features.throttle: Mabalin a agbalin a slow ti speed aging napardas a panaggamit

disclaimer.devices: Ti eSIM data packs ket kasapulan ti eSIM-compatible ken unlocked a device. Ti availability ket agbaliw babaen ti modelo ti phone, carrier, ken pagilian. Ti coverage ken speeds ket agbaliw babaen ti rehiyon.

small.title: Starter pack
small.desc: Agraman 3 GB a high-speed data — naimbag para ken light messaging ken occasional calls.
small.bestFor: Short trips, light messaging, ken occasional calls

medium.title: Traveler pack
medium.desc: Agraman 5 GB a high-speed data para ken trips, commuting, ken regular VoIP calls.
medium.bestFor: Weekend trips, regular VoIP calls, ken maps

large.title: Power pack
large.desc: Agraman 10 GB a high-speed data para ken heavy chat, calls, ken video idiay Chatforia network.
large.bestFor: Heavy chat, calls, video, ken hotspot use
large.aria: Gumatang Power user eSIM data pack

compare.title: Compare eSIM data packs
compare.disclaimer: Ti pudno a data usage ket agbaliw babaen ti panaggamit mo ti Chatforia (voice, video, media, ken dadduma a apps idiay phone mo).

family.title: Chatforia Family (shared data)
family.subtitle: Agshare ti maysa a data pool across pamilya mo. Maysa a bill, ad-adu a Chatforia accounts, global coverage.

small.title: Family Small
small.desc: Agraman 20 GB a shared high-speed data — naimbag para 2–3 a light users.

medium.title: Family Medium
medium.desc: Agraman 40 GB a shared high-speed data — naimbag para 3–5 a active members.

large.title: Family Large
large.desc: Agraman 80 GB a shared high-speed data — para ken power families nga agnanamnam a online.

feature.shared: Shared data pool para ken pamilya mo
feature.members: Invite aging 4 a dadduma a members
feature.manage: Manage ti limits para ken tunggal member
feature.topUp: Agdugtar pay ad-adu a packs anytime
feature.fairUse: Subject ti fair-use policy ken lokal a limits

family.disclaimer: Ti family packs ket ag-crear wenno ag-top up ti shared data pool. Mabalinmo a ma-invite ken ma-ikkat ti members anytime.
family.footnote: Ti family packs ket agshare ti maysa a data pool across linked Chatforia accounts. Ti availability ken limits ket agbaliw babaen ti pagilian ken lokal a regulations.

why.title: Apay a nagbaliw dagiti tattao ken Chatforia
why.subtitle: Ti Chatforia ket mangted kenka ti pudno a phone number, smart translation, ken nalawag a dalan a mapan ad-free no sakaen ti tiempo.

textnow.title: Chatforia vs TextNow
textnow.body: Bassit a ads idiay Free, nalawag a Plus upgrade no sakaen ti tiempo, ken Premium tools nga awan ken TextNow.

voice.title: Chatforia vs Google Voice
voice.body: Modern a app, global-first a design, ken built-in translation imbes ti daan a call forwarding.

messengers.title: Chatforia vs chat apps
messengers.body: Text ti pudno a phone numbers — saan laeng dagiti dadduma a users ti app — agraman AI ken status a built-in. Naimbag no aggapu ka manipud apps a kas ti TextFree wenno TextMe.

why.disclaimer: Ti panagcompare ket babaen ti publicly available a data ken mabalin a agbaliw. Dagiti dadduma a libre a text apps a kas ti TextFree wenno TextMe ket kasla laeng ken TextNow.

free.q: Daytoy a Free plan ket pudno nga libre?
free.a: Wen. Ti Free plan ket agraman Chatforia number, panagtawag, ken panagimessage agraman ads. Mabalinmo a malagip ti Free aging kasano ti kayatmo, wenno upgrade tapno i-remove ti ads ken ma-unlock ti ad-adu a features.

plusPremium.q: Ania ti pagdumaan ti Plus ken Premium?
plusPremium.a: Ti Plus ket i-remove ti ads ken agpaatiddog ti message history mo — naimbag para ti inaldaw a panaggamit. Ti Premium ket agdugtar ti extra customization, AI tools para rewrites ken replies, ken priority support para ken heavy users.

esim.q: Sadino ti panagtrabaho ti eSIM data packs?
esim.a: Ti Chatforia Mobile ket aggamit global eSIM coverage. Ti availability ket agbaliw babaen ti pagilian ken device mo. Makitam dagiti supported options inton activation idiay app.

cancel.q: Mabalin kadi a cancel wenno baliwan ti plan ko anytime?
cancel.a: Wen. Mabalinmo a manage wenno cancel ti subscription mo manipud ti billing page idiay app. Ti baliwan ket maaplikar inton maibus ti current billing period mo.

family.q: Kasano ti panagtrabaho ti Family packs?
family.a: Ti family packs ket ag-crear ti shared data pool across ad-adu a Chatforia accounts. Maysa a tao ti agbayad ti bill, ken mabalinmo a ma-invite wenno ma-ikkat ti members ken ag-set limits per tao.

gettingStarted.title: Rugian
gettingStarted.subtitle: Baro ka ken Chatforia? Daytoy a quick start ket mangted ti essentials tapno mabalinmo a ma-productivo dagiti minutos.

alert.text: Daytoy a guide ket agdakkel pay laeng agraman dagiti baro a features. No adda kulang, ibagam kami babaen ti

section1.title: 1) Agbuat ti account mo
section1.loginText: babaen ti account mo nga adda.

section2.title: 2) Rugian ti panagimessage
section2.item1: Agbuat ti DM wenno Group ken send ti umuna a mensahe mo.
section2.item2: Gamit ti instant translation tapno agchat ka across 100+ a pagsasao.
section2.item3: Padasem ti agpagarup a mensahe ken read receipts idiay Profile → Privacy.

section3.title: 3) Agpayso pay
section3.item1: Mabalinmo a ma-upgrade ti paid plan anytime idiay app.
section3.item2: No nakalog-in ka, mabalinmo a ma-link ti dadduma a devices ken i-setup ti encrypted backups manipud Settings idiay app.

account.q: Kasano ti panagbuat wenno panagrecover ti account ko?
account.a: Download ti app wenno gamit ti web, tap “Agbuat account”, verify ti email/phone mo. Tapno ma-recover, gamit ti “Nalipatan ti password”.

privacy.a: Wen. Dagiti mensahe ken calls ket end-to-end encrypted a default. Sika ken ti recipient laeng ti mabalin a basaen.

translate.q: Kasano ti panagtrabaho ti instant translation?
translate.a: Enable ti “Auto-translate” idiay Settings → Appearance & Language. Agtranslate kami on-device no ma-support, no saan ket babaen ti secure a APIs agraman bassit a metadata.

contact.a: Tawagem kami idiay support@chatforia.com. Idugtarmo ti screenshots ken ti version ti app mo.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.successMsg: Agyaman—ti team mi ket agreply babaen ti email.
contact.errorSend: Saan a mabalin a ma-send. Pangngaasi ta i-email ti support@chatforia.com.

intro.body: Daytoy a Privacy Policy ket mangipaliwanag no kasano ti panagcollect, panagusar, ken panagshare ti Chatforia (“mi”, “kami”) ti information no gamitmo ti apps ken services mi. Na-design ti Chatforia tapno mabassit ti data a mabalinmi a ma-access.

infoWeCollect.title: Information a ma-collect mi
infoWeCollect.account: Account info (e.g., email/phone) tapno ma-crear ken ma-secure ti account mo.
infoWeCollect.encrypted: Encrypted a laman (mensahe/calls) ket end-to-end encrypted; saanmi a mabalin a basaen.
infoWeCollect.diagnostics: Diagnostic/usage a kas ti crash logs, tipo ti device, wenno coarse analytics tapno ma-improve ti performance.

sms.title: Mobile phone numbers ken SMS
sms.body: No kayatmo a mangted ti mobile phone number, gamitmi daytoy tapno ma-enable ti features a kas ti account verification, login alerts, ken user-to-user messaging babaen ti SMS no ma-support. Mabalinmi a ma-send ti transactional SMS messages a maipangpangato ti account ken activity mo idiay Chatforia. Mabalinmo a i-opt out ti panagawat SMS anytime babaen ti panagreply babaen ti supported opt-out keyword (kas ti “STOP”) wenno babaen ti panagbaliw ti notification preferences mo idiay app. Saanmi a ma-sell ti phone number mo wenno gamit para kadagiti di maipangpangato a marketing.
sms.addRecipient: Agdugtar ti recipient nga adda ngato tapno mangrugi…

howWeUse.title: Kasano ti panagusar mi ti information
howWeUse.provide: Mangted ken ma-secure ti service (auth, spam/abuse detection).
howWeUse.improve: Ma-improve ti features (quality ti translation, reliability).
howWeUse.legal: Agtuloy a sumurot kadagiti legal a obligations.

sharing.title: Panagshare
sharing.body: Saanmi a ma-sell ti personal a data. Mabalinmi a ma-share ti bassit a data kadagiti processors (e.g., push notifications, analytics) babaen ti strict a contracts.

rights.title: Dagiti karbengam
rights.body: Babaen ti rehiyon mo (e.g., GDPR/UK GDPR/CPRA), mabalinmo a ma-request ti access, correction, deletion, wenno opt-out ti dadduma a processing. Contact: privacy@chatforia.com.

retention.title: Data retention & security
retention.body: I-store mi laeng ti kasapulan tapno ma-operate ti service ken agaplikar ti industry-standard a security. Ti E2E a laman ket saan a mabalin a ma-decrypt mi.

children.title: Ubbing
children.body: Ti Chatforia ket saan a ma-target kadagiti ubbing nga adda babasit 13 (wenno kasapulan ti lokal a linteg mo).

changes.title: Baliwan
changes.body: Ag-post kami ti updates ditoy ken agbaliw ti “Last updated” a fecha.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: privacy@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

intro.body: No gamitmo ti Chatforia ket maawatam dagitoy a Terms. No saanmo a maawat, saanmo a gamit ti service.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.itemAccurateInfo: Mangted ka ti nalawag a info ken i-secure ti credentials mo.
accounts.itemResponsibility: Sika ti responsible para ti activity idiay account mo.

acceptableUse.title: Acceptable a panaggamit
acceptableUse.itemNoAbuse: Saan a maipangpangato ti illegal, abusive, wenno infringing a laman; awan spam wenno automated abuse.
acceptableUse.itemSuspend: Mabalinmi a ma-suspend wenno ma-terminate ti account no adda violations.

sms.title: SMS communications
sms.body: No mangted ka ti mobile phone number, maawatam nga mabalinmi a ma-send ti SMS messages a maipangpangato ti account mo ken ti panaggamit ti service, kas ti login alerts, security notifications, ken mensahe a maipangpangato ti conversations nga inrugi wenno na-participateam. Saanmi a gamit ti SMS para promosyon wenno marketing no awan ti explicit a consent mo. Mabalin a maaplikar ti standard message ken data rates. Mabalinmo a i-opt out ti SMS anytime babaen ti panagreply babaen ti supported opt-out keyword (e.g., “STOP”) wenno babaen ti panagbaliw ti notification settings mo idiay app.

yourContent.title: Ti laman mo
yourContent.body: Ikeep mo ti karbengam kadagiti laman mo. Mangted ka kadagiti kasapulan a karbengam tapno ma-operate ti service (e.g., routing, storage, translation).

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers & liability
disclaimer.body: Ti service ket maipaay “kas adda” nga awan warranties. Aging ti kabaelan ti linteg, ti Chatforia ket saan a ma-liability para kadagiti indirect wenno consequential a damages.

changes.title: Baliwan
changes.body: Mabalinmi a ma-update dagitoy a terms; no agtuloy ka a gamit aging baliwan ket maawatam ti baliwan.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: support@chatforia.com • Chatforia LLC, 123 Example St, Sheridan, WY 82801, USA

doNotSell.title: Saan a ma-sell wenno ma-share ti Personal Information ko
doNotSell.body: Ti Chatforia ket saan a ma-sell ti personal a information. Dagiti California residents ket mabalin a ma-submit ti request babaen ti CPRA babaen ti button nga adda ngato.

cookies.title: Cookie Settings
cookies.body: Ti Chatforia ket aggamit ti bassit a cookies (e.g., session, security). Saanmi a gamit ti third-party ads cookies. Manage ti cookies babaen ti browser settings mo.

phoneNumberManager.unableToLoadStatus: Saan a mabalin a ma-load ti status ti phone number.
phoneNumberManager.noNumberAssigned: Awan ti number a na-assign. Pili ti maysa a numero babaen ti area code tapno mangrugi ti panagtext.

startChatModal.title: Rugian ti chat
startChatModal.nameUsernamePhoneEmail: Type ti nagan, username, phone, wenno email…
startChatModal.startWithSelected: Rugian ti chat ken ti na-pili
startChatModal.searchByUsernameOrPhone: Search babaen ti username wenno phone
startChatModal.searchPrompt: Type ti username wenno phone ken pindutem ti Search.
startChatModal.saveContactsHint: Dagiti phone/email entries ket ma-available inton ma-save mo a contacts.
startChatModal.failedBulkStart: Nabawi ti panagrugi ti chat ken ti na-pili a recipients.

sounds.freeNotice: Free ka — dagiti premium tones ket maipakita ngem na-lock. Upgrade tapno ma-unlock amin.

premiumGuard.requiresPremium: Daytoy a feature ket kasapulan ti Premium plan.

aiSettings.title: AI Settings
aiSettings.controlIntro: Control ti translation, smart replies, ken ForiaBot auto-responses.
aiSettings.showOriginalAlongside: Ipakita ti original a texto ken ti translation a side-by-side
aiSettings.smartRepliesHint: Send ti naudi a dadduma a naawat a mensahe (na-sanitize) ken AI tapno ma-suggest ti napardas a replies.
aiSettings.maskProfanity: Mask ti profanity idiay AI suggestions
aiSettings.maskProfanityHint: No on, dagiti suggestions nga agbalin manipud AI ket ma-mask ti flagged a sao
aiSettings.enableAutoReply: Enable auto-reply no adda busy ak
aiSettings.saveFailed: Nabawi ti panag-save ti AI settings

accessibilitySettings.title: Accessibility & Alerts
accessibilitySettings.accessibilityDesc: Options tapno maaramid a nalawag ti panaggamit ti Chatforia nga awan ti panagdengngeg.
accessibilitySettings.interfaceFontSizeHelp: Mangrugi nga adda normal a size. Dakkelen no kayatmo ti dakkel a texto idiay accessibility settings.
accessibilitySettings.notificationsDesc:
Visual alerts para mensahe & calls
Ipakita ti banners ken title blink tapno saanmo a mapalpas ti activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNew:
Vibrate no adda baro a mensahe (no ma-support)
Mangted ti device vibration agraman notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCall:
Flash ti screen no adda incoming call
Nabassit a napigsa a flash no agring ti call.
accessibilitySettings.autoTranscribeVoiceNotesDesc: Agdugtar ti transcript ken audio messages nga awatmo.
accessibilitySettings.changesSavedInstantly: Dagiti baliwan ket ma-save a dagus.
accessibilitySettings.visualAlertsDesc: Ipakita ti banners ken title blink tapno saanmo a mapalpas ti activity.
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewShort: Vibrate no adda baro a mensahe (no ma-support)
accessibilitySettings.vibrateOnNewDesc: Mangted ti device vibration agraman notifications.
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallShort: Flash ti screen no adda incoming call
accessibilitySettings.flashOnCallDesc: Nabassit a napigsa a flash no agring ti call.

privacySection.ciphertextOnlyNote: I-store laeng ti ciphertext idiay server. Ma-disable ti AI/Translate ken moderation previews.

linkedDevicesPanel.title: Linked Devices
linkedDevicesPanel.noneFound: Awan ti na-link a devices a nabirukan.

help.title: Tulong
help.cantLogin: Saan a mabalin a log in

peoplePage.searchPlaceholder: Search babaen ti alias, nagan, username, wenno phone
peoplePage.quickStartDesc: Dadduma a napardas a dalan a mangrugi.
peoplePage.inviteDesc: Share ti invite link mo tapno dagus a mangrugi ti panagchat.
peoplePage.getTheAppDesc: Agpaut ti panagkonektar no agbiyahe ka babaen ti Chatforia para iOS ken Android.
peoplePage.syncTip: Tip: Ti mensahe mo ket agsynchron across web ken mobile.

randomChat.title: Random Chat
randomChat.description: Agkita ka ti baro a tao dagus. Agmatch kami kenka ken lukatan ti temporary a chat room. Agchat ka anonymously umuna. Agdugtar Friend no nalawag ti panagpada.
randomChat.noPartner: Awan pay ti partner a nabirukan.
randomChat.saveGuard: Dagiti human-to-human chats laeng ti mabalin a ma-save
randomChat.ageDisclaimer: I-store mi laeng ti age range (saan ti exact a birth date). Daytoy ket mausar tapno ma-reasonable ti Random Chat pairings. Tapno ma-match ka kadagiti tattao (saan laeng ken RiaBot), i-set ti age band mo idiay Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.ageBandRequired: I-set ti age range mo idiay Profile → Age & Random Chat tapno ma-match ka kadagiti tattao.
randomChat.ageBandCallout: Tapno ma-match ka kadagiti tattao (saan laeng ken RiaBot), i-set ti age band mo idiay Settings → Age & Random Chat.
randomChat.subtitle: Agkita ka ti baro a tao dagus, wenno pili ti agchat ken Ria.
randomChat.setAge: I-set ti age range mo idiay Profile → Age & Random Chat tapno ma-match ka kadagiti tattao.

ria.intro: Kumusta 👋 Ni Ria ni. Ania ti adda kaniak?

greetings.long1: Kumusta {{name}} 👋 Addaak ditoy. Ania ti adda kaniak?
greetings.long2: Hi {{name}} 😊 Ania ti kayatmo a pagchatantay ita nga aldaw?
greetings.long3: Kumusta {{name}}!! Addaak nga agdengngeg — ania ti adda?
greetings.long4: Naimbag a makitam, {{name}} 👋 Ania ti adda kaniak ita nga aldaw?
greetings.long5: Kumusta {{name}} 😊 Kayatmo a agvent, agsaludsod, wenno agchat laeng?
greetings.long6: Hi {{name}}!! Adda tiempoak — ania ti kayatmo a pagchatantay?
greetings.short1: Kumusta {{name}}, addaak pay laeng ditoy. Ania ti adda?
greetings.short2: Welcome back {{name}} 👋 Ania pay ti kayatmo a maipangpangato?
greetings.short3: Nagsubli ka manen, {{name}}? 😊 Ibagam ti adda kaniak.
greetings.short4: Kumusta {{name}} 👋 Sakaem ti panagchatantay nga adda ngato?
greetings.short6: Oh kumusta {{name}}!! Adda baro a bagay kaniak?

login.title: Agtuloy ken Chatforia
login.subtitleReturning: Log in ken Chatforia account mo
login.subtitle: Log in ken Chatforia account mo
login.googleUnavailable: Ti Google sign-in ket saan a ma-access
login.appleUnavailable: Ti Apple sign-in ket saan a ma-access

forgot.title: Nalipatan ti Password
forgot.helper: Iserrek ti email nga inusar mo a nagbuat ti Chatforia account mo ken agsend kami ti secure a link tapno ma-reset ti password mo.
forgot.emailInvalid: Pangngaasi ta iserrekam ti valid a email address.
forgot.genericError: Saan a mabalin a ma-process ti request. Pangngaasi ta padasem manen dagus.
forgot.sentHelper: No adda account nga agtutop ken daytoy a email, na-send mi ti password reset link. Mabalin a mapan dagiti minutos a maawat. Siguroem a kitaem ti spam wenno promotions folder.

login.ssoUnavailable: Ti single-sign-on ket saan a ma-access ita. Gamit ti username & password laeng.

error.missing: Pangngaasi ta iserrekam ti credentials mo.
error.unprocessable: Salladaw a request. Kitaem ti username/email ken password mo.
error.deviceLimit: Naabot ti device limit para ken Free plan. Log out idiay sabali a device wenno upgrade ken Premium tapno ma-link ti ad-adu a devices.
error.premiumRequired: Daytoy a aksyon ket kasapulan ti Premium plan.

dialer.title: Tawag
dialer.subtitle: Keypad & recents. (No saanmo a gamit ti PSTN, rugian ti calls manipud conversation header.)

video.title: Video
video.directDesc: 1:1 camera call ken sabali a user.
video.roomsDesc: Multi-party video agraman shared room name.
video.deeplinkTip: Tip: mabalinmo a ma-deep link dagus ken /video?room=room-name.

direct.title: Direct Video
direct.subtitle: Rugian ti 1:1 video call babaen ti phone number wenno Chatforia username.
direct.desc: 1:1 camera call ken sabali a user.
direct.tipInvite: Tip: I-paste ti numero ken tawagem nga awan ti panag-save ti contact. Ag-invite kami ti non-users babaen ti link.

search.placeholder: Search babaen ti nagan wenno username
search.aria: Search babaen ti nagan wenno username

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.subtitle: Agbuat room wenno ag-join ti adda babaen ti panagtype ti isu met a nagan.
rooms.desc: Multi-party video agraman shared room name.
rooms.tip: Tip: i-share daytoy a nagan kadagiti dadduma, wenno deep link ken /video?room=room-name.

directVideo.findUserPh: Search babaen ti nagan wenno username

phoneWarning.title: Ti numero mo ket aging dagus
phoneWarning.body: Ti numero mo a {{number}} ket ma-release no {{date}} no saan a ma-reactivate.

support.heading: Ania ti mabalinmi a tulongan?

quickTopics.login: Saan a mabalin a log in

support.contactIntro: Ag-email kami kenka ti response. Idugtarmo ti detalye tapno tulonganmi a ma-reproduce ti problema.
support.sent: Na-send ti mensahe. Agreply kami babaen ti email.
support.sendError: Saan a mabalin a ma-send. I-email ti support@chatforia.com laeng.

encryptionRecovery.title: Manage Encryption
encryptionRecovery.description: I-backup, i-restore, i-unlock, wenno i-reset ti encryption key mo.

alert.keyRequiredBody: Daytoy a browser ket saan a mabalin a ma-decrypt ti encrypted a mensahe mo ita. I-restore, i-unlock, wenno i-reset ti key mo tapno agtuloy.

unlockPasscode.label: Unlock passcode (current device)
unlockPasscode.description: Mausar tapno ma-decrypt ti susi mo a lokal sakbay ti panag-export

backupPassword.label: Backup password
backupPassword.description: Mausar tapno ma-encrypt ti backup file

restoreBackupPassword.label: Backup password
restoreBackupPassword.description: Ti password nga inaramatmo no nag-backup ka ti susi mo idiay iPhone

newLocalPasscode.label: Baro a local passcode
newLocalPasscode.description: Protektaran ti susi a adda rest idiay daytoy a browser

resetLocalPasscode.label: Baro a local passcode
resetLocalPasscode.description: Kasapulan sakbay ti panag-reset tapno ma-protektaran ti baro a susi ditoy a device

messages.backupCreated: Na-crear ti key backup ken na-download.
messages.keyRestored: Na-restore ti key manipud account backup.

errors.restoreIncomplete: Incomplete wenno salladaw ti key restore para ken daytoy a account
errors.noBackup: Awan ti encrypted backup nga adda para ken daytoy a account
errors.missingPublicKey: Ti backup ket kulang ti public key
errors.noServerPublicKey: Daytoy a account ket saan a mangiparang ti server public key
errors.serverBackupMismatch: Ti server backup ket saan a agtutop ken ti current account encryption key
errors.resetIncomplete: Ti encryption reset ket saan a na-complete a nalawag

confirm.reset:
Reset encryption para ken daytoy a account?

Dagiti daan a encrypted a mensahe ket mabalin a di mabasa no saanmo a ma-restore ti original a key.

encryptionRecovery.resetDescription: Daytoy ket agbuat ti baro a encryption key para ken account mo. Dagiti daan a encrypted a mensahe ket mabalin a di mabasa no saanmo a ma-restore ti original a key.

footer.doNotSell: Saan a ma-sell ti Info ko

links.do-not-sell-my-info: Saan a ma-sell ti Info ko

press.title: Press
press.contactLine: Para media inquiries, tawagem kami idiay
press.boilerplateBody: Ti Chatforia ket privacy-first a messaging app nga agpaatiddog ti cross-language a panagchat. Dagiti mensahe ket end-to-end encrypted a default, ken ti built-in translation ket ag-support 100+ a pagsasao nga agdadan. Dagiti users mabalin a ma-enable ti agpagarup a mensahe, i-optional ti read receipts, ken ag-sync across devices. Ma-access idiay iOS, Android, ken web.
press.scanTip: Ditoy desktop? I-scan babaen ti phone mo tapno alaen ti app.

careers.title: Careers
careers.intro: Maysa a bassit a founding team ti agbangon ti Chatforia — privacy-first, global messenger nga ag-launch idiay web, iOS, ken Android. No importante kenka ti privacy, encryption, ken nalawag a user experiences, kayatmi a mangeg kenka.
careers.openRoles: Open founding roles: Lead Full-stack Engineer, Backend Engineer (Node.js), Frontend/Web Engineer (React), Mobile Engineer (iOS), Mobile Engineer (Android), DevOps/SRE, Security & Encryption Engineer, Telecom Engineer (Twilio + eSIM).
careers.apply: Kasano ti panag-apply: Gamit ti button nga adda ngato tapno ma-email ti resume mo ken links.
careers.whyBullets:
• Tumulong ka a mangbangon ti foundation ti baro a global messenger.
• Ship improvements nga agusar across web, iOS, ken Android.
• Agtrabaho ka a direkta ken ti founder maipangpangato ti architecture ken product direction.
• Own ti high-impact a partes ti stack: messaging, voice, video, encryption, telecom, AI.
• Ag-join ka idiay pangrugi — sakbay a dakkel ti user base.

about.title: Maipangpangato ken Chatforia
about.description: Ti Chatforia ket secure, multilingual a messenger agraman end-to-end encryption, instant translation, ken voice/video calling. Ti mission mi ket nalawag: tumulong a mangkonektar ti tattao—seguro, privado, ken across pagsasao.

values.control: Control: Agpagarup a mensahe & read receipts ket optional.
values.access_aria: Access para amin: Auto-translate 100+ a pagsasao.
values.control_aria: Control: Agpagarup a mensahe ken read receipts ket optional.

about.howDescription: Dagiti mensahe ket ma-encrypt idiay device mo sakbay a rumuar. Ti translation, backups, ken device sync ket na-design tapno mabassit ti mabalin a makita ti servers mi.

advertise.title: Advertise babaen ti Chatforia
advertise.description: Maabot ti engaged a messaging users babaen ti tasteful, brand-safe a placements. Mangtedkami ti banner inventory idiay high-visibility a spots, sponsorships, ken house promos. Dagiti premium subscribers ket saan a makita ti ads.

adsense.withPubIdShort: Agserbi pay kami ti inventory babaen ti Google AdSense. Mabalinmo a ma-target ti Chatforia babaen ti publisher ID {{pubId}}, wenno gamit ti form nga adda ngato para direct sponsorships.
adsense.noPubIdShort: Agserbi pay kami ti dadduma a inventory babaen ti Google AdSense. Direct sponsorships ket ma-access—gamit ti form nga adda ngato.

advertise.noPlacementsPublic: Agfinalizing kami ti ad inventory mi. Ibagam ti campaign mo ken recommendami ti placements.

why.highSession: Napigsa a session frequency ken dwell time idiay chat UI
why.brandSafe: Brand-safe a formats; respectful a frequency capping
why.sponsoredMoments: Sponsored moments (e.g., “Rugian ti Chat” modal) ket ma-access
why.deals: Direct deals wenno programmatic babaen AdSense/Google Ads

form.submittedMsg: Agyaman! Ti inquiry mo ket adda nga agturong. Agtuloykami a mang-contact kenka dagus.
form.missingRequired: Pangngaasi ta punuem ti nagan, email, ken mensahe.
form.mailtoInfo: Ag-open ti email client mo tapno ma-send ti inquiry…
